input.user_input: Expand the indemnification clause to also cover data breaches and regulatory fines, not just third-party IP claims.

actual:
I would be happy to help expand the indemnification clause, but it looks like you haven't uploaded a document yet. 

Could you please upload the contract or document you are working on? Once you do, I can review the current indemnification language and draft the appropriate additions to cover data breaches and regulatory fines. Alternatively, if you'd like me to draft a standalone indemnification clause from scratch, just let me know!
